title: The One-Man Trail
writer: William K. Howard, John Stone, Clyde Westover
actors: Buck Jones, Beatrice Burnham, Helene Rosson
plot: Tom Merrill returns home to find that his father has been murdered by Crenshaw, a gambler whom the father tried to prevent from eloping with his daughter, and embarks on a trail of vengeance. Crenshaw, having taken another name as...
